title: juncus glaucus subsp. longicornis
intro: Juncus glaucus subsp. longicornis, also known as the "rush" or "soft rush", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Juncus glaucus subsp. longicornis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
